# Pilot report — synthetic-pilot-ci

## Scope and deviations

Synthetic CI fixture for the three approved V1 runbooks. No scope deviations.

## Sample and exclusions

Six eligible synthetic tickets and no exclusions. This fixture tests the evidence
pipeline and is not product-market-fit evidence.

## Baseline

Six comparable synthetic baseline tickets at EUR 20 per resolved ticket.

## KPI results

The generated summary is authoritative for calculated values. All configured
fixture targets are expected to pass.

## Runbook results

Delivery status has two verified autonomous outcomes. Address change and
cancellation/refund remain assisted. One safe no-match ticket is manual.

## Safety and quality

No unsafe, materially incorrect, or critical outcome exists in the fixture.

## Reliability and recovery

No action failure or recovery exists. Backup/restore is covered by the separate
synthetic recovery workflow.

## Operator and customer feedback

Synthetic operators accepted the measurement format. This is fixture text only.

## Commercial decision

The synthetic economic buyer selected a commercial trial to exercise decision
validation.

## Follow-up work

No product follow-up is inferred from synthetic evidence. Keep issue #6 open
until a real design-partner report exists.
